seo_title: The Sundune | Coastal Desert Retreat in Palm Springs | 3 King Beds
seo_description: The Sundune is a coastal-inspired desert condo in Palm Springs with 3 KING beds and walkable downtown location. Fresh, nostalgic, and effortlessly Palm Springs, just minutes from The Surf Club. Book direct, save 15%.
description_heading: Sun-bleached, sea-kissed, four minutes from Palm Canyon.
description_p1: The Sundune is a coastal-inspired desert hideaway with three full KING beds. Fresh, nostalgic, effortlessly Palm Springs. Just minutes from The Surf Club and the heart of downtown. The kind of place most people stop looking once they find it.
description_p2: The design runs on a coastal-desert frequency: sun-bleached textures, natural materials, a palette that pulls from surf and sand. Real retro personality. Copper and cool aloe. Early-morning light through linen curtains. Not trendy. Not trying too hard. Just good design that makes you want to stay in.
description_p3: Three full king beds means three couples can share without anyone drawing straws over who gets the pull-out. Full kitchen, a living room that doesn't feel like camping. Walk out the door and you're in it: Palm Canyon Drive, coffee, galleries, restaurants, all on foot. This is the Palm Springs that regulars come back to.
description_p4: The Sundune is nostalgic in the right way. It doesn't recreate a specific decade. It captures a feeling. Long summers. Road trips. Salt air. The kind of vacation where you lose track of the date and consider staying an extra night because leaving feels wrong.
